abstract: With the rapid prevalence and massive user growth of social media platforms, efficiently targeting potential customers on these platforms has grown in importance for companies. Enhancing the likelihood that a social media user will engage with brand posts holds profound implications for online marketing strategy design. However, predicting customer engagement on social media comes with its own set of challenges. In this work, we design a graph neural network model called the graph neural network with attention mechanism for customer engagement (GACE) to predict customer engagement (like/comment/share) of brand posts. We exploit large-scale content consumption information from the perspective of heterogeneous networks and learn latent customer representation by developing a graph neural network model. We examine GACE using a large-scale Facebook data set, and the comprehensive results show significant performance improvement over state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, we conduct an interpretability analysis, which sheds some light on the explanation of the proposed model. To illustrate the practical significance of our work, we provide examples to quantify the economic value of improved predictive power using a cost-revenue analysis in the context of targeted marketing.

ob.ai_reason: 图神经网络预测社交媒体客户参与度
ob.tldr: 研究社交媒体品牌帖子用户参与度预测问题。提出基于注意力机制的图神经网络模型GACE，利用异构网络学习用户潜在表示。Facebook数据集验证显示模型显著优于基线方法，并通过可解释性分析说明预测机制，结合成本收益分析量化营销价值。

title: Customer Engagement Prediction on Social Media: A Graph Neural Network Method
title_zh: 社交媒体用户参与度预测：一种图神经网络方法
